articles.title: Bitcoin Tops $65,000 Despite Record-High Social Disinterest: What Is Driving the Rally? — Bitcoin tops $65,000 as dovish Fed remarks and soft inflation data lift prices while crypto social volume nears a two-ye

Shares of crypto-linked companies are trading higher amid a rise in Bitcoin after weaker-than-expected June inflation data reduced expectations that the Federal Reserve would hike interest rates this year. The prospect of a less restrictive monetary policy may support demand for risk assets.
